items.name: djinni
items.take_refuse_description: The 10 foot tall djinni glares at you.

items.name: peel
items.examine_description: a slippery banana peel that looks like it could cause a nasty fall if someone stepped on it...

items.name: ladder
items.description: placeholder object until I fix update lexicon

rooms.name: Tower Cell
rooms.description: in a cramped stone cell at the top of a lonely tower. The air is hot and dry, and the only light comes from a small barred window high above. The stone walls are rough to the touch, and the mournful sound of a lone crow echoes through the silent room.
rooms.listen_description: The sound of a lone crow echoes through the otherwise silent room; but what it portends - who can say?

items.name: door
items.description: iron-clad door with a small barred window
items.location_description: is set into the east wall.
items.examine_description: The wooden door is colidly clad in iron and looks extremely sturdy. A small barred window is set into the upper half of the door, potentially allowing a glimpse into the next room. The bars are made of sturdy iron and are firmly embedded into the door, making escape through the window impossible.
items.open_action_description: Surprisingly, the cell door is not locked. It creaks open, revealing a small antechamber beyond.
items.listen_description: You press your ear to the door and listen carefully. You hear no signs of life on the other side.

features.name: window
features.description: a small barred window set into the upper half of the cell door
features.examine_description: Through the narrow bars you can just make out the dim shape of a guard slumped on the floor of the antechamber beyond. He isn't moving.

east.refuse_description: The cell door is firmly shut.

rooms.name: Cell Antechamber
rooms.description: in a small antechamber just outside the tower cell. Light streams in through a narrow window, casting long shadows across the stone floor. The air is cooler here, but an uneasy stillness hangs over the room. There is a door to the north that is strongly bolted shut from the outside.

items.name: trapdoor
items.locked_state_description: A closed and locked rusty iron trapdoor
items.unlocked_state_description: A closed but unlocked rusty iron trapdoor
items.unlockable_description: The trapdoor is locked and you need a key
items.opened_state_description: A slick fireman's pole leads down into the deep darkness below from an open trapdoor that
items.open_action_description: You open the trapdoor, revealing a slick fireman's pole that leads down into the deep darkness below.

items.name: pole
items.examine_description: a firestation-type pole that is slathered in slippery grease
items.take_refuse_description: The pole is firmly anchored and your efforts to take it only result in you getting your hands covered in grease.

containers.name: body
containers.examine_description: The lifeless body of a prison guard lies slumped on the floor, his uniform stained with what looks like remains of his lunch.
containers.take_refuse_description: You can't take the body, but you can search it if you like.

items.name: cigarettes
items.description: an empty crumpled pack of cigarettes

items.name: lighter
items.ignite_success_description: You flick the lighter and a small flame appears.

items.name: torch
items.lit_state_description: an old wooden torch that is burning brightly, casting flickering shadows on the walls

features.name: window
features.description: a narrow barred window is set high in the wall, allowing a thin shaft of light to pierce the gloom.
features.examine_description: it is set high in the wall, allowing a thin shaft of light to pierce the gloom. The bars are made of sturdy iron and are firmly embedded into the stone, making escape through the window impossible.

features.name: door
features.description: a sturdy wooden door is set into the north wall.
features.examine_description: that its surface is scarred with scratches and dents. It is firmly bolted shut from the outside, and there is no handle or keyhole visible.

down.go_refuse_description: The pole descends into utter darkness. Did you want to slide down?

rooms.name: Pole Landing
rooms.description: in a circular stone chamber with a low ceiling. The greased pole ends here, its metal surface gleaming faintly in the dim light. Dusty footprints lead into a twisting passage where the darkness seems to swallow all sound.

items.name: pole
items.take_refuse_description: The pole is firmly anchored and your efforts to take it only result in you getting your hands covered in grease.

up.refuse_description: The pole is extremely slippery and cannot be climbed.

rooms.name: Twisting Passage (South Bend)
rooms.description: in a narrow stone passage that immediately bends out of sight. The walls are slick and uneven, and the floor slopes slightly. Without a light source, it would be dangerously easy to walk straight into the wall.

rooms.name: Twisting Passage (North Bend)
rooms.description: in a narrow stone passage that turns sharply again here, forming a cramped dogleg. The air is cold and carries faint echoes from somewhere ahead. The stone underfoot is worn smooth by countless footsteps.

rooms.name: Guard's Antechamber
rooms.description: in a small stone chamber that feels abandoned and forgotten. A broken bench leans against the wall, and a rusted spear rack stands empty. A faint light comes through a thin horizontal-slit window near the ceiling, casting long, shadows across the room.

items.name: victrola
items.description: an old-fashioned Victrola with a large brass horn and a hand crank
items.examine_description: The Victrola looks somewhat out of place here. Its brass horn is dented, but the hand crank appears intact.
items.turn_action_description: You turn the crank on the victrola and a cloud of dirty black smoke issues from its cone. It groans out a soft magical sounding tone, but obviously (?) this victrola is broken. (?)

features.name: bench
features.description: a broken wooden bench sits crookedly against the wall

features.name: rack
features.description: a rusted spear rack stands empty

rooms.name: Lamp Chamber
rooms.description: in a magnificently decorated chamber lit by a soft, unnatural glow. The air hums softly, as though waiting for something to happen.

containers.name: alcove
containers.examine_description: The alcove is shallow and carved directly into the stone wall. The interior is faintly illuminated by the strange light as though it holds some hidden secret.
containers.location_description: is carved into the far wall

items.name: lamp
items.description: a battered and dull brass lamp
items.lit_state_description: a battered brass lamp that is glowing with a magical light
items.rub_success_description: The lamp grows shiny from rubbing.
items.rubbed_state_description: a battered and shiny brass lamp

rooms.name: Blank Chamber
rooms.description: in an oddly empty room with smooth stone walls. You see a large mural of an imposing Djinni on the west wall.
rooms.dark_description: It is pitch dark. You can't see anything.

features.name: mural
features.description: it depicts an imposing Djinni with unsettlingly lifelike eyes that seem to follow your movements

features.name: eyes
features.description: the eyes, though lifelike, are clearly just painted on the wall. Yet the seem to follow your every move around the room

rooms.name: Colossal Cave
rooms.description: in a colossal cave, which opens expansively in every direction; its jewel-studded walls shimmering in reflected light. A large crystal blue pool lies to the west and you can just make out a narrow ledge on the other side
rooms.listen_description: The sound of gently lapping water fills the air, tranquilly echoing off the dazzling walls.

features.name: pool
features.description: a large crystal blue pool fills the western half of the cave. The water is clear, cold and placid, yet deep. You can just make out a narrow ledge on the western side

features.name: walls
features.description: the walls of the cave are studded with glittering jewels that catch and reflect the light in dazzling patterns

west.go_refuse_description: There is a large pool of water blocking your way west, although you do see a narrow ledge within swimming distance.

rooms.name: Pool Ledge
rooms.description: on a narrow ledge across the pool.
rooms.dark_description: It is pitch dark. You can't see anything.

containers.name: mermaid
containers.description: a beautiful mermaid with shimmering scales and flowing hair
containers.examine_description: A beautiful mermaid with shimmering scales and flowing hair.

items.name: vase
items.description: a magnificent vase carved from a single emerald, with intricate patterns etched into its surface

east.go_refuse_description: There is a large pool of water blocking your way east, although you do see solid ground on the other side.

rooms.name: South Tunnel
rooms.description: in a low, echoing tunnel carved by centuries of dripping water. The air grows cooler as the passage slopes steeply upward.
rooms.dark_description: You can feel the tunnel narrowing around you, but you can't see a thing.

rooms.name: Ravine Edge
rooms.description: at the edge of a steep ravine. A narrow stream glitters faintly at the bottom.

items.name: rope
items.tied_state_description: a long sturdy rope is tied securly and dangles down from the edge of the ravine

items.name: hook
items.description: an iron hook is firmly anchored into the rock at the ravine's edge
items.examine_description: This massive iron hook appears as though it could bear a lot of weight.

features.name: ravine
features.description: a sheer drop into a rocky gorge with a fast rushing stream running along its bottom.

features.name: stream
features.description: a narrow ribbon of water glinting far below

down.refuse_description: The ravine wall is too steep - you may need to prepare some equipment.
down.go_refuse_description: You can't go that way - there's a sheer cliff you need to scale.

rooms.name: Clover Rest
rooms.description: beside a pleasant stream that winds gently south through a bed of soft clover. Sunlight filters down the ravine walls in shifting ribbons, and the air is cool and peaceful.

features.name: stream
features.description: a clear, gentle stream flowing over smooth stones

features.name: clover
features.description: a thick bed of soft green clover that looks surprisingly comfortable

features.name: ravine walls
features.description: tall stone walls rising steeply above you, too narrow to climb without help

up.refuse_description: The ravine wall is too steep - you may need to prepare some equipment.
up.go_refuse_description: You can't go that way - there's a sheer cliff you need to scale.

rooms.name: South Meadow
rooms.description: in a sunlit meadow where tall grasses sway in a gentle breeze. Wildflowers dot the landscape, and clusters of wild carrots grow among the greenery. A small cottage with a crooked chimney stands nearby.

items.name: carrot
items.speak_description: The carrot is flattered by your attention, but doesn't understand a word you said. It cheerfully waves hello!
items.eaten_success_description: The cheery orange carrot SCREAMS as you force it down your hideous throat. His screams die out to a gurgle as he is driven into the pit of your greedy stomach.

features.name: wild carrots
features.description: a patch of wild carrots with feathery green tops

features.name: grasses
features.description: tall meadow grasses that ripple softly in the breeze

features.name: wildflowers
features.description: bright wildflowers scattered across the meadow

features.name: cottage
features.description: a small cottage with a crooked chimney and a weathered wooden door hanging loosely ajar
features.examine_description: The cottage looks old and worn, but there's a certain charm to it. The wooden door hangs loosely ajar, inviting you to step inside and explore. The crooked chimney suggests that the cottage has seen better days, but it also adds to its character and mystique.

rooms.name: Cottage Interior
rooms.description: inside a small, cozy cottage. Sunlight filters through a round window, illuminating a simple wooden table at the center of the room.

containers.name: table
containers.description: a simple wooden table with a pliant clay bowl sitting on top
containers.location_description: stands in the middle of the cottage

items.name: onion
items.description: a small white onion with papery skin

items.name: mushroom
items.description: an odd-looking mushroom with a spiraled cap

rooms.name: Demo End
rooms.description: standing on a small, impossibly solid platform of cloud, high above the world. The air is cool and thin, and the land below looks like a painted map. Wisps of cloud drift lazily past at eye level.

features.name: clouds
features.description: soft white clouds drifting slowly past, close enough to touch but somehow always just out of reach

features.name: world below
features.description: a distant patchwork of forests, rivers, and mountains far beneath your feet

down.go_refuse_description: You peer over the edge and decide it is better to take the ladder. The world below is impossibly far away.
